query:
-- Mismatch report: conversations where lastStatus doesn't match the actual latest message
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_conversations,
  SUM(CASE WHEN wc.lastFromMe = 1 AND (wc.lastStatus IS NULL OR wc.lastStatus IN ('pending', 'received')) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS stale_fromMe_status,
  SUM(CASE WHEN wc.lastMessagePreview IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS null_preview,
  SUM(CASE WHEN wc.lastMessageAt IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS null_timestamp
FROM wa_conversations wc;

  SUM(CASE WHEN wc.lastFromMe = 1 AND (wc.lastStatus IS NULL OR wc.lastStatus IN ('pending', 'received')) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS stale_fromMe_status,
  SUM(CASE WHEN wc.lastMessagePreview IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS null_preview,
  SUM(CASE WHEN wc.lastMessageAt IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS null_timestamp
FROM wa_conversations wc;
